meeting_summary: Team discussed finalizing a dashboard update for client delivery before the weekend. They reviewed remaining issues with data presentation and agreed on final revisions to be completed and sent today.

key_topics.summary: Overall dashboard is in good shape with clean numbers and improved formatting, but needs better framing for March usage dip and clearer summary slide wording.
Discussed whether to include speculation about onboarding changes causing support ticket increase or leave explanation for Tuesday meeting discussion.
Decided to leave out the benchmark comparison chart that was discussed last week to avoid unnecessary additions.

decisions.decision: Send dashboard update to client today rather than waiting until Monday
decisions.context: Holding it wouldn't add much value and client needs time to review before Tuesday meeting
Wouldn't change the recommendation and adding charts now would be counterproductive

decisions.decision: Acknowledge support ticket increase without over-committing on the cause
decisions.context: Uncertain about connection to onboarding changes, better to discuss in person on Tuesday

action_items.task: Tighten wording on the trend slide and rewrite summary bullets
action_items.context: Need to improve framing of March dip and make summary bullets more specific

action_items.task: Send revised dashboard back for review
action_items.context: Final review needed before sending to client
